[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000000 1
1 00010000 1
2 01100000 2
3 10000100 2
4 00010100 2
5 11001000 3
6 00001000 1
7 00000000 a

01 10 11000000 2
12 21 00001000 1 match 6
23 32 00010000 1 match 1
34 43 00010000 1 match 1
45 54 00010100 2 match 4
56 65 00100100 2
67 76 10001100 3
70 07 10000100 2 match 3

02 20 00010001 2
13 31 01000000 1
24 42 00010000 1 match 1
35 53 00110000 2
46 64 10000100 2 match 3
57 75 00000100 1
60 06 11000111 5
71 17 10001000 2

03 30 01010000 2
14 41 10000000 1 match 0
25 52 00010000 1 match 1
36 63 01100000 2 match 2
47 74 10000100 2 match 3
50 05 00010100 2 match 4
61 16 11001000 3 match 5
72 27 00001000 1 match 6

04 40 10010100 3
15 51 00000000 a match 7
26 62 00001001 2
37 73 00000000 a match 7
